AI automation for Private Equity

Returns are made in the back office. Make yours faster.

We deploy AI workers across deal sourcing, due diligence, fund accounting, portfolio operations and LP reporting — so partners compound operational alpha across funds and vintages, instead of chasing data rooms. Fixed-price. First agents live in 8–12 weeks.

GlobalCoverage
The Private Equity Reality

Your returns live and die in the back office between deals.

PE firms lose deal flow, partner time and LP confidence to back-office friction: opaque pipelines, due-diligence drowning in PDFs, scattered portfolio data, and LP transparency demands that outpace what IR teams can deliver. In a market where speed and operational alpha decide returns, the back office can't stay analog.

1

Deal pipeline is a black box.

Most pipeline data lives in CRMs nobody updates and email threads nobody searches. Partner time goes to deals that never close while the proprietary deal slips to a competitor with a tighter process.

2

Due diligence drowns in paper.

VDRs explode, vendor DD reports pile up, IC packs get rebuilt manually for every deal. Associates spend nights synthesizing what an agent could pre-digest in minutes — while the deal lead waits to make a real decision.

3

Portfolio data lives in 80 spreadsheets.

Every portfolio company sends KPIs in their own format, on their own cadence. Board packs take weeks to assemble. Value creation gets discussed anecdotally instead of measured rigorously — and exit readiness is a surprise, not a plan.

4

LP transparency outpaces IR capacity.

DDQs, capital calls, distributions, ESG queries, look-throughs — every LP wants more, faster, in their preferred format. IR partners spend 30–40% of their week chasing data instead of building relationships that lead to the next allocation.

The MLM Approach

Custom agents, built for every private equity function.

We don't deploy generic software. We design AI workers around the processes, tools and people of each function — then connect them where it matters. Click any department to explore.

Case study

Proof, not promises.

Two reference deployments — a German asset management firm's 1.5M-document archive for office properties made audit-ready, and a stalled SAP S/4HANA program reactivated in ~7 weeks with 389 processes documented.

Case 01 · Asset management firm for office properties 🇩🇪
>90%
1.5M+ documents indexed across 70+ properties.
Document navigator
1.5M+
Documents across 1.3M m² of managed office space and 70+ properties OCR'd, auto-tagged and made fully searchable — payback in 8 months, with 1,700 working hours per year recovered.
1,700 hrs/yrManual OCR eliminated
>90%Search time reduction
8 monthsPayback period

Outcomes, not software licenses. Fully covered.

We don't sell tools. We deliver outcomes. Here's what every engagement guarantees — activated on day one.

Frequently asked

Answers before the first call.

First automations typically go live within 8–12 weeks. Most engagements reach payback inside 12 months. We don't run multi-year transformation programs — we deliver working agents fast and iterate.
No. Our agents sit on top of what you have — DealCloud, Affinity or Salesforce on the deal side; Investran, eFront, Allvue or iLEVEL on fund accounting (or your outsourced fund admin partner — SS&C, Citco, Apex, IQ-EQ, Alter Domus); Datasite, Intralinks or iDeals on VDRs; LP portals, ESG platforms and BI stacks downstream. Where an integration doesn't exist, our agents operate the same screens your team uses today.
They move up the value chain. Deal partners, associates, IR teams, fund accountants and operating partners stay in control — every agent action is auditable and reversible, and humans retain ultimate responsibility. What goes away is copy-paste, data scraping and reconciliation, not judgement on deals.
Fixed-price per workflow automation. If during delivery we determine a process cannot be automated, you receive a voucher to automate a different process instead. Optional SLAs range from business-hours support to 24/7 coverage.
Hosted in the region of your choice, GDPR-aligned, with role-based access, full audit trails and the option of private deployment. For private equity specifically: we support deal-team isolation, MNPI walls and per-deal data segmentation — built for confidentiality, not just compliance. Your data is never used to train anyone else's models.
Deal pipeline tracking and CIM extraction, vendor DD coordination and IC pack assembly, capital calls and distributions, NAV and portfolio valuation, LP DDQ and quarterly reporting, AIFMD/SEC filings, K-1 drafting and FATCA/CRS, side-letter tracking, portfolio company KPI aggregation and board packs, ESG monitoring and scope 3, and executive search across portfolio. We scope per function — every agent is custom-built around your deal cycle, fund vehicles and LP base.
JF
